title: CoinGecko
description: Crypto market data, prices, trends, and analytics via CoinGecko API

mcp_coingecko.title: All CoinGecko Tools
mcp_coingecko.description: Expose every tool offered by the CoinGecko MCP server. The exact tools are discovered live from the server at runtime.

api_key.title: API Key (optional, overrides system key)
api_key.description: Your own API key for CoinGecko. Leave empty to use the system key.
